sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30797" key="e)qiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐθ-ικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n30797.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">arising from habit</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ἀρεταί</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.3a</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
